name: What are common mistakes people make after bad AI law firm referral?
description: Not asking about AI, delaying action, poor documentation.[3][4]

mainEntity.name: What are common mistakes people make after bad AI law firm referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not asking about AI, delaying action, poor documentation.[3][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Signing retainers without AI questions, delaying complaints, talking to adjusters without lawyer. Many ignore AI role until case fails, per ethics cases.[3] Key factors: not documenting intake, assuming human vetting, missing referral fee disclosures.[4] Immediately consult independent counsel, preserve all docs. Avoid firm pressure to continue.
